name: Ebook MCP
what_it_does: An MCP server that enables AI agents to interact with EPUB and PDF ebooks through natural language. Exposes tools for extracting metadata, table of contents, and chapter/page content in Markdown format from both EPUB and PDF files. Supports batch processing of multiple files and provides structured access to book content for summarization, quizzing, and interactive reading.
use_cases: Having AI summarize or discuss specific chapters of an ebook
Building AI-powered study tools that quiz you on book content
Extracting and converting ebook content to Markdown for downstream processing
Managing and searching across a personal ebook library via AI
Interactive reading sessions where you ask questions about book content
not_for: PDFs without a table of contents (chapter navigation limited without TOC)
Very large PDFs without pagination (should use page ranges to avoid memory issues)
best_when: You have a collection of EPUB or PDF ebooks and want to interact with their content through an AI assistant for reading, studying, or content extraction.
avoid_when: Your PDFs lack tables of contents, your ebooks are DRM-protected, or you need to process very large documents without pagination strategies.

auth.notes: No authentication required. Runs locally. User IDs used for organizational purposes only, not access control.

pricing.notes: Apache-2.0 licensed. Fully free and open source.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Basic tool documentation with clear API signatures. Error handling for edge cases (missing TOC, large files) mentioned but not systematically documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All operations are read-only content extraction, inherently idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: PDF features require a table of contents in the document for chapter navigation
Large PDF processing should use page ranges to avoid memory issues
Requires uv (Python package manager) for installation and running
Built on fastmcp framework - depends on its stability
No DRM support - will fail silently or error on protected content
Chapter IDs for EPUB must be discovered via get_toc before accessing content
